Surf.name: Surf
Surf.description: A water spell that deals damage and knockback in a large area.

Surf2.description: A water spell that deals more damage and knockback in a larger area.

Bolt.name: Bolt
Bolt.description: A lightning bolt that has a 25% chance to Stun.

Bolt2.description: A stronger lightning bolt that has a 50% chance to Stun.

Fireball.name: Fire Blast
Fireball.description: A fireblast that inflicts Burn 2 in an area.

Fireball2.description: A more damaging fireblast that inflicts Burn 3 in an area.

FreezeRay.name: Frost Blast
FreezeRay.description: Shoot a blast of ice in a line that freezes the first unit it hits.

FreezeRay2.description: Shoot a blast of ice in a line that freezes every unit it hits.

Blast.name: Energy Blast
Blast.description: A high damage spell that hits a single target.

Blast2.description: A high damage spell that hits a single target and deals extra damage equal to your [img:int].

MagicMissile.name: Magic Missile
MagicMissile.description: Shoot an infinite-range projectile that can't miss.

MagicMissile2.description: Shoot an infinite-range projectile that can't miss. Emit 3 Sparkles.

WallOfFire.name: Wall of Fire
WallOfFire.description: A fire spell that inflicts Burn 1 and spawns fires in a perpendicular line.

WallOfFire2.description: A fire spell that damages, inflicts Burn 3 and spawns fires in a perpendicular line.

HyperBeam.name: Hyper Beam
HyperBeam.description:
Target a tile. At the start of your next turn, unleash an extremely high damage mega beam on that tile.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

HyperBeam2.description: Target a tile. At the start of your next turn, unleash an extremely high damage mega beam on that tile.

MeteorStorm.name: Meteor Storm
MeteorStorm.description: Summon meteors that hit random tiles in a large area. These meteors have a chance to stun, spawn fires, or leave rocks behind.

MeteorStorm2.description: Summon meteors that hit random tiles in a larger area. These meteors have a chance to stun, spawn fires, or leave rocks behind.

MegaBlast.name: Mega Blast
MegaBlast.description: Deal high damage in a cone.

MegaBlast2.description: Deal high damage in a larger cone.

Slow2.description: Inflict Slow on units in an area.

WindSlash.name: Wind Slash
WindSlash.description: A wind spell that hits an entire line with Knockback 1.

WindSlash2.description: A wind spell that hits a wide line with Knockback 2.

Warp2.description:
Teleport diagonally any distance.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

MageTeleport2.description:
Teleport to any tile.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

MageSwap2.description:
Switch positions with any unit.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Absorb.name: Absorb
Absorb.description: Spend all of your mana and heal that much HP.

Absorb2.description: Spend all of your mana and heal that much HP. Excess healing is converted into [img:shield].

ManaMeld.name: Mana Meld
ManaMeld.description: Give all of your mana to a unit in range 3.

ManaMeld2.description: Give all of your mana plus 2 to a unit.

Telefrag.name: Telefrag
Telefrag.description: Teleport onto a unit, dealing damage to yourself and that unit.

Telefrag2.description: Teleport onto a unit, dealing damage to that unit.

ChaosTeleport2.description: Teleport to a random tile. Deal damage to units adjacent to the tile you teleport to.

CryoHeal.name: Cryo-Heal
CryoHeal.description: Heal and inflict Freeze 1 on a unit in range 3.

CryoHeal2.description:
Heal and inflict Freeze 1 on any unit.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Gust.name: Gust
Gust.description: Knock back each unit adjacent to a chosen tile 1 space.

Gust2.description: Knock back each unit adjacent to a chosen tile 3 spaces, at infinite range.

Blizzard.name: Blizzard
Blizzard.description: Deal ice damage in a wide line with Knockback 1 that inflicts Slow and has a 15% chance to freeze.

Blizzard2.description: Deal more ice damage in a wide line with Knockback 10 that inflicts Slow and has a 25% chance to freeze.

Inferno.name: Inferno
Inferno.description: Deal fire damage and inflict Burn 3 to all units in a large circle around you.

Inferno2.description: Deal more fire damage and inflict Burn 5 to all units in a large circle around you.

Thunderburst.name: Thunderburst
Thunderburst.description: Shoot lightning bolts in eight directions with a 15% chance to Stun.

Thunderburst2.description: Shoot stronger lightning bolts in eight directions with a 25% chance to Stun.

DealWithTheDevil.name: Deal with the Devil
DealWithTheDevil.description:
Injure yourself, then restore 15 mana.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

DealWithTheDevil2.name: Deal with the Devil
DealWithTheDevil2.description:
Injure yourself, then restore all your mana.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

ForbiddenFlame.name: Forbidden Flame
ForbiddenFlame.description:
Damage all enemies and burn the entire map. There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

ForbiddenFlame2.description:
Heavily damage all enemies and burn the entire map. There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

ForbiddenFlood.name: Forbidden Flood
ForbiddenFlood.description:
Knock back and damage all enemies, then flood the entire map. There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

ForbiddenFlood2.description:
Knock back and damage all enemies, heal all allies, then flood the entire map. There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

/*WaterSphere.name: Whirlpool
/*WaterSphere.description: Create a whirlpool that spins units and inflicts Confusion on them.

WaterSphere2.description: Create a larger whirlpool that spins units and inflicts Confusion on them.

WaterSphere.name: Whirlpool
WaterSphere.description: Create a whirlpool that spins units and inflicts Confusion on them.

ChainLightning.name: Chain Lightning
ChainLightning.description: Shoot lightning that chains randomly to other nearby units up to 2 tiles away.

ChainLightning2.description: Shoot lightning that chains randomly to other nearby enemies up to 3 tiles away.

Shatter.name: Shatter
Shatter.description: A melee attack that instantly kills frozen units. If used on a boss, it instead removes Frozen to deal 15 damage and inflict Slow 2.

Shatter2.name: Shatter
Shatter2.description: A spell that instantly kills frozen units in an area. If used on a boss, it instead removes Frozen to deal 15 damage and inflict Slow 2.

ForbiddenFulmination.name: Forbidden Fulmination
ForbiddenFulmination.description:
Strike all enemies with lightning, inflicting Stun. There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

ForbiddenFulmination2.description:
Strike all enemies with lightning, inflicting Stun 2. There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

FireBolt.name: Firebolt
FireBolt.description: Cast a fire/electric spell that inflicts Burn 1 and has a 15% chance to inflict Stun in an X shaped area.

FireBolt2.description: Cast a fire/electric spell that inflicts Burn 2 and has a 30% chance to inflict Stun in an X shaped area.

IcicleTaser.name: Icicle Zapper
IcicleTaser.description: Shoot an ice/electric bolt in a straight line. It inflicts Slow 2, has a 25% chance to Stun and a 25% chance to Freeze.

IcicleTaser2.description: Shoot 2 ice/electric bolts in a straight line. They inflict Slow 2, have a 25% chance to Stun and a 25% chance to Freeze.

FreezerBurn.name: Freezer Burn
FreezerBurn.description: Cast a fire/ice spell that inflicts Burn 2, Slow 2 and Knockback 2 on all units around you.

FreezerBurn2.description: Cast a fire/ice spell that inflicts Burn 3, Slow 3 and Knockback 3 on all units around you in a larger area.

Corrupt.name: Corrupt
Corrupt.description: Injure yourself, then gain +3 Magic Damage.

Corrupt2.description: Injure yourself, then gain +3 Magic Damage and emit a Sparkle.

Jolt.name: Jolt
Jolt.description: Shoot a lightning bolt that deals 1 damage and knocks the unit it hits 3 tiles in the direction it's facing.

Jolt2.description: Shoot a lightning bolt that deals 2 damage and knocks the unit it hits 6 tiles in the direction it's facing.

Smolder.name: Smolder
Smolder.description: Inflict Burn 1 and +1 [img:spd] to a unit in range.

Smolder2.description:
Inflict Burn 1 and +1 [img:spd] to any unit.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

FireSurge.name: Fire Surge
FireSurge.description: A fire spell that increases its range, area, damage, and Burn by 1 every turn.

FireSurge2.description: A fire spell that increases its range, area, damage, and Burn by 1 every turn. Starts stronger.

IceSurge.name: Ice Surge
IceSurge.description:
An ice spell that increases its range and Slow every turn. At 2 turns, it gains Immobilize 1. At 3 turns, it gains Freeze 1.
[s:.7](Current turns: {v0})[/s]

IceSurge2.description:
An ice spell that increases its range, damage, and Slow every turn. At 2 turns, it gains Immobilize 1. At 3 turns, it gains Freeze 1.
[s:.7](Current turns: {v0})[/s]

LightningSurge.name: Lightning Surge
LightningSurge.description: An electric spell that increases its range and damage by 2 every turn, and its stun chance by 10%.

LightningSurge2.description: An electric spell that increases its range and damage by 3 every turn, and its stun chance by 10%.

Creshendo.name: Crescendo
Creshendo.description:
This spell gains +1 damage, range and area, and -1 mana cost each time you cast a spell.
This spell resets after you cast it.

Creshendo2.description:
This spell gains +1 damage, range and area, and -1 mana cost each time you cast a spell.
This spell loses half its boosts after you cast it.

Divide.name: Divide
Divide.description:
Lose Damage equal to half of your basic attack's damage, rounded up. For the rest of the battle, you can attack an extra time each turn.
[s:.7](This can't be cast if your basic attack's damage is 1 or less.)[/s]

Divide2.description:
Lose Damage equal to 1/3rd of your basic attack's damage, rounded up. For the rest of the battle, you can attack an extra time each turn.
[s:.7](This can't be cast if your basic attack's damage is 1 or less.)[/s]

ForbiddenFrost.name: Forbidden Frost
ForbiddenFrost.description:
Apply Freeze 2 to each unit except for yourself and 1 other chosen unit.
Deal 5 Damage to enemies and heal each ally 5 HP.
There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

ForbiddenFrost2.description:
Apply Freeze 2 to each unit except for yourself and 1 other chosen unit.
Deal 10 Damage to enemies and fully heal each ally.
There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

BlackMagic.name: Black Magic
BlackMagic.description:
Drop to 1 HP. Gain mana equal to the HP lost.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

BlackMagic2.name: Black Magic
BlackMagic2.description:
Drop to 1 HP. Gain mana equal to the HP lost and gain All Stats Up 2.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Teach.name: Teach
Teach.description: Reduce the cost of another unit's spells by 1 until the end of their turn.

Teach2.description: Reduce the cost of a unit's spells by 1 until the end of their turn. This can target yourself.

HomingBlasts.name: Homing Blasts
HomingBlasts.description: Shoot 3 Magic Missiles at random enemies.

HomingBlasts2.description: Shoot 4 Magic Missiles at random enemies.

Replicate.name: Replicate
Replicate.description: The next spell you cast is cast twice.

Replicate2.name: Replicate
Replicate2.description: The next spell you or another unit casts is cast twice.

Magnify.name: Magnify
Magnify.description: Your basic attack gains +1 range and area until the end of the turn.

Magnify2.description:
Your basic attack gains +2 range and +1 area until the end of the turn.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

TriAttack.name: Tri-Attack
TriAttack.description: A Fire / Ice / Electric spell that inflicts Burn 1, Slow 1, and has a 5% chance to inflict Stun.

TriAttack2.description: A Fire / Ice / Electric spell that inflicts Burn 1, Slow 1, and has a 5% chance to inflict Stun in an area.
